text: {"claims":[{"statement":"In 2021 the journal issued a correction after finding a coding error in the 2018 paper.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"In 2021 the journal issued a correction after finding a coding error in the 2018 paper.","entailment":"The quoted sentence directly states that the journal issued a correction in 2021 because it discovered a coding error in the earlier paper.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"The corrected analysis found no statistically significant reduction in 30-day mortality.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"The corrected analysis found no statistically significant reduction in 30-day mortality,","entailment":"The quote reports the result of the re‑analysis, indicating that mortality within 30 days was not significantly reduced.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"mortality","timeframe":"30-day","quantifiers":"no statistically significant reduction","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"The original positive conclusion should no longer be relied upon.","claimType":"value","quote":"the original positive conclusion should no longer be relied upon.","entailment":"The sentence advises that the earlier favorable conclusion is no longer trustworthy.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"normative"}]}
